description: This file controls which monsters are preloaded in a preset, based on the Act number. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: Act
columns.description: Defines the Act number used for each Monster Preset. Uses values between 1 to 5.

columns.name: Place
columns.description: This defines the Monster Preset which is used for preloading, such as during level transitions Reference of a superuniques.Superunique, monstats.Id, or MonPlace.code
